title: stelis croatii
intro: Stelis croatii, also known as the Croat's stelis, is a species of orchid native to tropical Central America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis croatii include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Stelis croatii typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots or leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
